tenders.title: Provision of Security Services at TOSCI Head Office and Zonal Offices
tenders.eligibility: Registered security firms with experience in government institutional security and facilities protection
tenders.notes: Operational infrastructure security and facilities protection across TOSCI's active seed research and quality assurance zonal offices. Reference via TendersInfo Tanzania portal.

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Gender Policy Assessment & Digital Inclusion Architecture — Individual Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Individual consultants or firms with expertise in gender policy, digital equity and agricultural policy analysis in Tanzania
tenders.notes: High-level consulting framework evaluating resource parity and analyzing how digital agritech platforms, field data collection, and financial structures effectively reach women and youth in rural zones. TZT Ref No: 143648289.

tenders.title: Working Jointly in Agriculture — Commercial Joint Venture Operations Call
tenders.eligibility: Tech-enabled logistics partners, input suppliers, and agritech systems for co-execution of scaled joint production operations
tenders.notes: Open commercial procurement call seeking technology-enabled logistics partners, input suppliers and agritech systems to co-execute scaled joint agricultural production operations in Tanzania.

tenders.body: Tanzania Agricultural Research Institute (TARI) — Agriculture and Fisheries Development Programme (AFDP)
tenders.title: Procurement of 1 Tractor and Its Implements Under AFDP Project
tenders.eligibility: Registered machinery suppliers and agricultural equipment distributors
tenders.notes: Core machinery supply and field implement asset mobilization for agricultural development research sites managed under the Agriculture and Fisheries Development Programme (AFDP).

tenders.body: Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry and Fisheries — Uganda
tenders.title: Uganda Climate Smart Agricultural Transformation Project — Invitation for Bids
tenders.eligibility: Qualified contractors, technology providers and agri-businesses with climate-smart agricultural experience
tenders.notes: Major government-funded initiative to transform Uganda's agricultural landscape with climate-smart technologies and practices. Project reference P173296.

tenders.body: Tanzania Official Seed Certification Institute (TOSCI) — via NeST
tenders.title: Public Awareness and E-Label System Integration Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Consultancy firms with experience in digital certification systems, e-labelling, supply chain authentication and stakeholder sensitization in the agricultural inputs sector
tenders.notes: Designing and executing sensitization protocols for seed sector stakeholders on deployment of cryptographic e-labels to verify input supply-chain authenticity. Published via the National e-Procurement System of Tanzania (NeST).

tenders.body: The Royal Norwegian Society for Development (Norges Vel)
tenders.title: Value Chain Evaluation & Resilient Agriculture Mid-Term Review — Tanzania
tenders.eligibility: Specialised multi-country evaluation teams with expertise in agricultural value chain assessment, climate-resilient farming systems and producer-owned business ecosystem analysis
tenders.notes: Seeking a specialised evaluation team to assess agricultural value chains and build data-driven approaches to optimise climate-resilient farming and producer-owned business ecosystems in Tanzania. Published via Devex International Procurement Board.
